sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO I_INFORMATION_RECEIVE_T (informationid,informationsendid,receiveid,transferoper,transferoperid,transferdepid,transfertime, validflag,feedbackflag,signoper,signoperid,signtime,feedbackoper,feedbackoperid,feedbacktime,feedbackcontent) VALUES ($informationid$,$informationsendid$,$receiveid$,'$transferoper$',$transferoperid$,$transferdepid$,'$transfertime$', 1,1,'$signoper$',$signoperid$,'$signtime$','$feedbackoper$',$feedbackoperid$,'$feedbacktime$','$feedbackcontent$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(a.id) from i_information_receive_t a left join i_information_t b on a.informationid = b.id where a.receiveid = $receiveid$
(b.infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(b.infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
a.validflag = $validflag$
a.feedbackflag = $feedbackflag$
transfertime >= '%$starttime$%'
'%$endtime$%' >= transfertime
b.infostate = '%$infostate$%'
b.urgentflag = '%$urgentflag$%'
b.infosource = '%$infosource$%'
b.infotype = '%$infotype$%'

select a.*,b.infotitle,b.infotype,b.urgentflag,b.infosource,b.infostate,b.annotationid,c.departname as departname from i_information_receive_t a left join i_information_t b on a.informationid = b.id left join sys_department_t c on a.transferdepid = c.id where a.receiveid = $receiveid$
(b.infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(b.infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
a.validflag = $validflag$
a.feedbackflag = $feedbackflag$
transfertime >= '%$starttime$%'
'%$endtime$%' >= transfertime
b.infostate = '%$infostate$%'
b.urgentflag = '%$urgentflag$%'
b.infosource = '%$infosource$%'
b.infotype = '%$infotype$%'
order by a.id desc
select a.*,b.departname as receivename from i_information_receive_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.receiveid = b.id where a.id = $id$

select a.*,b.departname as receivename from i_information_receive_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.receiveid = b.id where a.informationid = $informationid$
a.informationsendid = $informationsendid$
sqlMap.update: update i_information_receive_t set validflag=$validflag$, signoper='$signoper$',signoperid=$signoperid$, signtime='$signtime$' where id = $id$

update i_information_receive_t set feedbackflag=$feedbackflag$, feedbackoper='$feedbackoper$',feedbackoperid=$feedbackoperid$, feedbacktime='$feedbacktime$',feedbackcontent='$feedbackcontent$' where id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
select count(a.id) from i_information_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.departmentid = b.id where a.id in ( (select distinct informationid from i_information_receive_t where validflag>0 and transferdepid = $transferdepid$) )
(a.infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(a.infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
a.addtime >= '%$starttime$%'
'%$endtime$%' >= a.addtime
a.infostate = '%$infostate$%'
a.urgentflag = '%$urgentflag$%'
a.infosource = '%$infosource$%'
a.infotype = '%$infotype$%'

select a.id,a.infotitle,a.infocontent,a.departmentid,a.infosource,a.infotype,a.infostate,a.urgentflag,a.addtime, b.departname as departname from i_information_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.departmentid = b.id where a.id in ( (select distinct informationid from i_information_receive_t where validflag>0 and transferdepid = $transferdepid$) )
(a.infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(a.infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
a.addtime >= '%$starttime$%'
'%$endtime$%' >= a.addtime
a.infostate = '%$infostate$%'
a.urgentflag = '%$urgentflag$%'
a.infosource = '%$infosource$%'
a.infotype = '%$infotype$%'
order by a.id desc
select a.*,b.departname as receivename from i_information_receive_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.receiveid = b.id where a.id in $informationreceiveid$
